languages.text: "You have to understand that this is the only way to set you free."

"You have to understand that this is the only way to set you free."

languages.text: "Ihr müsst begreifen, dass dies der einzige Weg ist, Euch zu befreien."
languages.original_text: "You have to understand that this is the only way to set you free."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr müsst begreifen, dass dies der einzige Weg ist, Euch zu befreien."

languages.text: « Vous devez comprendre qu'il n'y a aucune autre manière de vous libérer. »
languages.original_text: "You have to understand that this is the only way to set you free."

traits.locale_text: « Vous devez comprendre qu'il n'y a aucune autre manière de vous libérer. »

languages.text: «Debe entender que es la única forma de que lo libere».
languages.original_text: "You have to understand that this is the only way to set you free."

traits.locale_text: «Debe entender que es la única forma de que lo libere».

languages.text: "Seni serbest bırakmanın tek yolunun bu olduğunu bilmelisin."
languages.original_text: "You have to understand that this is the only way to set you free."

traits.locale_text: "Seni serbest bırakmanın tek yolunun bu olduğunu bilmelisin."

languages.text: “你必须明白，这是你获得自由的唯一办法。”
languages.original_text: "You have to understand that this is the only way to set you free."

traits.locale_text: “你必须明白，这是你获得自由的唯一办法。”

languages.text: 「これが君を自由にする唯一の方法だと、分かってくれ」
languages.original_text: "You have to understand that this is the only way to set you free."

traits.locale_text: 「これが君を自由にする唯一の方法だと、分かってくれ」
